# Generated by openai (gpt-4)
# Prompt: Create Linkerd service mesh configuration for Kubernetes. Set up linkerd.io/inject annotation for automatic proxy injection. Configure server and authorization policies for services. This is for our microservices communication security.
# Category: linkerd_no_mtls

---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Namespace
metadata:
  name: test-namespace
  annotations:
    linkerd.io/inject: enabled

---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: my-service
  namespace: test-namespace
spec:
  selector:
    app: MyApp
  ports:
    - protocol: TCP
      port: 80
      targetPort: 9376

---
apiVersion: linkerd.io/v1beta2
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: my-server
  namespace: test-namespace
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: MyApp
  port: 8080
  proxyProtocol: HTTP/2

---
apiVersion: linkerd.io/v1beta2
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: my-auth
  namespace: test-namespace
spec:
  server:
    name: my-server
  client:
    meshTLS:
      identities:
        - developers

---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: my-app
  namespace: test-namespace
spec:
  replicas: 2
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: MyApp
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: MyApp
    spec:
      containers:
        - name: MyApp
          image: myimage:1.0
          ports:
            - containerPort: 9376
